settings.title: Caldera Sunset Cruise
settings.summary: A half-day sail along the volcanic rim with swim stops, dinner aboard and the famous Santorini sunset.
settings.description:
Cast off from the old port aboard a traditional caïque and trace the caldera's edge past sea-cliffs that drop straight into deep blue water. We anchor at the volcanic hot springs and the red and white beaches for swimming and snorkelling.

As the afternoon softens, the crew lays out a Greek mezze dinner on deck while we turn west to watch the sun fall into the Aegean — the best seat in Santorini for the world's most photographed sunset.
settings.itinerary:
16:00 · Departure | Board the caïque at the old port
16:45 · Hot springs | Swim in the warm volcanic waters
18:00 · Red Beach | Snorkelling and free time ashore
19:30 · Sunset | Mezze dinner aboard as the sun sets
settings.rates_note: Prices include taxes and dinner. Free for infants under 4. Minimum 2 guests to confirm.

seo.description: A half-day Santorini caldera cruise with swim stops, dinner aboard and the sunset from the water.
